title: Section 35O
content: 1[35O. Exclusion of time taken for copy.--In computing the period of limitation prescribed for an appeal or application under this Chapter, the day on which the order complained of was served, and if the party preferring the appeal or making the application was not furnished with a copy of the order when the notice of the order was served upon him, the time requisite for obtaining a copy of such order shall be excluded.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 44 of 1980, s. 50 and Schedule V, Pt. II-2, for sections 35, 35A and 36 (w.e.f. 11-10-1982).
